violations.text: The doors to the outside, located at the store entrance, the door beside receiving, and the receiving door, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026
Refrigerator door gasket of the dairy reach-in observed in poor repair, split away from the door. Gasket must be repaired/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

The doors to the outside, located at the store entrance and receiving, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2025

Doors to the outside, located at the store entrance and the back emergency door, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2024
Boxes of food/candy were observed stored on the floor in the upstairs storage room. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the dairy shelving have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2024
